requirement_topic.en: DERK and NOS BiH Project Grid-Connection Review

summary.en: Bosnian solar projects are reviewed by DERK and NOS BiH according to project category, project route, and connection agreement. Grid-connection acceptance is separate from product test certificates and covers protection settings, remote dispatch interface, metering architecture, operation model, and project commissioning for local and cross-border-linked assets via the Ploče corridor.
summary.zh: 波斯尼亚光伏项目按项目类型、项目路径与接入协议由DERK和NOS BiH进行审查。并网验收独立于产品测试证书，涵盖保护参数、远程调度接口、计量架构、运行模式、投运证据以及通过Ploče走廊联动的跨境关联资产。
summary.zht: 波斯尼亞太陽能專案按專案類型、專案路徑與接入協議由DERK和NOS BiH審查。併網驗收獨立於產品測試證書，涵蓋保護參數、遠端調度介面、計量架構、運作模式、投運證據以及通過Ploče走廊聯動的跨境關聯資產。

standards_or_laws: Bosnia and Herzegovina electricity market and unlicensed generation implementation references
DERK interconnection and project participation framework
NOS BiH project connection and acceptance practice

summary.en: China State Grid and China Southern Power Grid documentation, together with GB/T 19964-2024 and GB/T 37408, can support technical comparison, but Bosnian grid acceptance remains dependent on local DERK and NOS BiH routes.
summary.zh: 中国国网、南方电网文档及 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408 可用于技术比较，但波斯尼亚并网接受仍取决于当地DERK与NOS BiH路径。
summary.zht: 中國國網、南方電網文件及GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408可用於技術比較，但波斯尼亞併網接納仍取決於當地DERK與NOS BiH路徑。

standards_or_laws: China State Grid and China Southern Power Grid project procedures

gap.en: For Bosnia, the gap is project acceptance. Exporters should prepare single-line diagrams, inverter model certificates, protection tables, grid-code parameter ranges, reactive-power capability, remote control evidence, meter and communication compatibility, commissioning records, and local-language operation documents for the project owner and NOS BiH.
gap.zh: 波斯尼亚的差距在于项目验收。出口商应为项目业主和NOS BiH准备单线图、逆变器型号证书、保护参数表、电网规范参数范围、无功功能范围、远程控制证据、计量与通信兼容性、投运记录及本地语言运行文件。
gap.zht: 波斯尼亞的差距在於專案驗收。出口商應為專案業主和NOS BiH準備單線圖、逆變器型號證書、保護參數表、電網規範參數範圍、無功能力、遠端控制證據、計量與通訊相容性、投運記錄及當地語言運行文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects that seek Bosnia and Herzegovina grid connection through DERK and NOS BiH; acceptance is project- and operator-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese grid approval does not transfer to Bosnia DERK/NOS BiH connection approval

source.publisher: State Electricity Regulatory Commission (DERK) and Independent System Operator (NOS BiH)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Bosnia grid connection as a project-based approval path separate from product certificates. China GB/T project files should be mapped to DERK/NOS BiH requirements before claim-ready.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将波斯尼亚并网视为独立于产品证书的项目批准路径。建议在宣称准备就绪前将中国GB/T项目材料映射为DERK/NOS BiH要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將波斯尼亞併網視為獨立於產品證書的專案批准路徑。建議在宣稱準備就緒前將中國GB/T專案材料映射為DERK/NOS BiH要求。
